header: One install. This is what you get.
subheadline: Real screenshots, zero mockups — every tile shows Desiderio working in a seeded TYPO3 site, from inline editing to a phone-perfect frontend.

items.title: Edit the page on the page
items.description: The Visual Editor lets editors work directly on the rendered page with the live theme applied — click, type, publish. No preview round-trips.

image.title: Editing in the Desiderio Visual Editor
image.alternative: TYPO3 Visual Editor showing a Desiderio page being edited inline with live preview.
image.description: Screenshot of inline editing in the Visual Editor with Desiderio installed.

items.title: Flawless on every phone
items.description: Container queries and responsive tokens keep all 255 elements sharp at 390px — this is the Ember preset on a real mobile viewport.

image.title: Desiderio features page on mobile in the Ember preset
image.alternative: Tall mobile screenshot of a Desiderio features page rendered in the Ember theme preset.
image.description: Mobile-viewport screenshot of a live Desiderio frontend page.

items.title: One wizard, ten groups
items.description: The new-content wizard sorts all 255 elements into ten curated groups — the right block is seconds away.

image.title: Desiderio content wizard
image.alternative: TYPO3 new-content wizard listing all ten Desiderio element groups.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.

items.title: 8 ready-made forms
items.description: Contact, quote, and newsletter forms ship prebuilt, with a Friendly Captcha fallback included.

image.title: Bundled Desiderio forms
image.alternative: TYPO3 forms module listing the eight ready-made Desiderio forms.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.

items.title: Theme settings for editors
items.description: Preset, dark mode, density, radius, and fonts live in site settings — a full restyle without a deployment, by the person who asked for it.

image.title: Desiderio theme site settings
image.alternative: TYPO3 site settings showing the Desiderio theme category with preset and appearance options.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.
